title: Fall-2021 todo cluster — chiropractor, OSU waitlist, python
html:
TL;DR

  • Mid-August-2021 todo capturing Yahir's transition into OSU: call chiropractor, hit back Kira and Charlee, call wisdom-teeth, Options for therapy, finalize with Dave, deposit checks, email OSU waitlist, ping Ryan Fila, continue python course, walk Lola.
  • "Send email for waitlist to OSU" — Yahir was on the OSU waitlist as late as mid-August 2021, three weeks before fall term — a pivotal moment most of the GP teen era notes don't surface.
  • "Continue with python course" — first vault mention of Python as a self-study target, the skill acquisition that would feed CS 161B and eventually the Bromenu / Rankett builds.
  • "Options for therapy" — first explicit therapy mention; pairs with the Oct 19 fix glasses note ("establish therapy") showing the topic stayed live for two months.
  • The mixes physical-health (chiropractor, wisdom teeth), administrative (waitlist, deposits), social (Kira, Charlee, Dave, Ryan Fila), skill-building (python), and pet care (Lola) — the full surface of an 18-year-old's transition life in one 10-bullet list.

Note

The week before college. Yahir at 18 stacking ten unrelated commitments — body (chiropractor, teeth), mind (therapy), school (OSU waitlist, python), money (deposits), social (Dave finalize, Kira + Charlee text-back, Ryan Fila ping), pet (Lola walk) — into one note he could check off. The OSU waitlist line is the load-bearing one: it locates Yahir's pre-college weeks in a state of not-yet-confirmed, which contextualizes the surrounding manifesto-flurry of late October 2021 as someone who just barely made it in.

Connections

  • osu — waitlist context
  • python — first vault mention
  • therapy — first explicit
  • david · kira · lola
  • 2021 10 19 fix glasses fafsa todo — therapy thread continuation
  • grants pass teen era
